description_long: This rifle features a robust, metallic body with a matte black finish and tan polymer components, including the pistol grip and stock. The receiver is detailed with visible mechanical parts and a detachable box magazine, suggesting a modern, semi-automatic or automatic design. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a metallic muzzle device, likely a flash hider or compensator. Iron sights are mounted along the top rail, and a folding bipod is attached near the front for stability during firing. The overall construction appears durable, with a mix of metal and polymer materials for strength and reduced weight. The rifle's design is utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black and tan rifle with a detachable magazine, iron sights, and a folding bipod, featuring a robust metal and polymer construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, muzzle device, and aligned iron sights.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, tan stock and grip, detachable magazine, and folded bipod.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, stock, and bipod from the other side.
